ast.name: error
ast.source: This document was already integrated as a sub-document. You should create a second instance instead with the same guid.
ast.target: 此文档已作为子文档集成。您应创建第二个具有相同 guid 的实例。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Yjs was already imported. This breaks constructor checks and will lead to issues! - https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438
ast.target: Yjs 已被导入。这会破坏构造函数检查并导致问题！ - https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438

ast.name: error
ast.source: Caught error while handling a Yjs update
ast.target: 处理 Yjs 更新时捕获到错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to open connecton to PartyServer
ast.target: 无法打开到 PartyServer 的连接

ast.name: error
ast.source: [yaos] Critical: Could not locate CodeMirror 6 EditorView. Live binding disabled.
ast.target: [yaos] 严重：无法定位 CodeMirror 6 EditorView。实时绑定已禁用。

ast.name: log
ast.source: IndexedDB persistence timed out — proceeding without cache
ast.target: IndexedDB 持久化超时 — 继续无缓存运行

ast.name: log
ast.source: IndexedDB errored during wait — proceeding without cache
ast.target: IndexedDB 在等待期间出错 — 继续无缓存运行

ast.name: log
ast.source: Provider sync timed out — entering offline mode
ast.target: 提供程序同步超时 — 进入离线模式

ast.name: log
ast.target: 提供程序已同步 — 已接收房间状态

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已将 Y.Doc 标记为已初始化（哨兵已设置）

ast.name: log
ast.source: Blob download gate: workspace layout ready
ast.target: Blob 下载门控：工作区布局已就绪

ast.name: log
ast.target: 主机未配置 — 同步已禁用

ast.name: log
ast.target: 令牌未配置 — 同步已禁用

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在等待 IndexedDB 持久化...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 启动期间发生致命认证错误

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在等待提供程序同步...

ast.name: log
ast.source: Late first sync arrived during reconcile — marked pending
ast.target: 首次同步延迟到达，发生在协调期间 — 已标记为待处理

ast.name: log
ast.source: Reconnect sync arrived during reconcile — marked pending
ast.target: 重连同步到达，发生在协调期间 — 已标记为待处理

ast.name: log
ast.source: Network online event — requesting fast reconnect
ast.target: 网络在线事件 — 请求快速重连

ast.name: log
ast.source: Network offline event — marking status offline
ast.target: 网络离线事件 — 标记状态为离线

ast.name: log
ast.target: 协调已在进行中 — 已排队

ast.name: log
ast.source: teardownSync: tearing down all sync state
ast.target: teardownSync：正在拆除所有同步状态

ast.name: log
ast.target: 重置缓存：正在重新初始化

ast.name: log
ast.source: Nuclear reset: reinitializing (will re-seed from disk)
ast.target: 核重置：正在重新初始化（将从磁盘重新播种）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start one-click deployment in your browser.
ast.target: 在浏览器中启动一键部署。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown to other devices in live cursors and presence.
ast.target: 在实时光标和在线状态中显示给其他设备。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text files larger than this are skipped for live document sync.
ast.target: 大于此大小的文本文件将跳过实时文档同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync images, PDF files, and other attachments through object storage. This is enabled by default when the server supports it.
ast.target: 通过对象存储同步图片、PDF文件和其他附件。当服务器支持时，此功能默认启用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Attachments larger than this are skipped.
ast.target: 大于此大小的附件将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default 1 favors reliability on slow or mobile networks.
ast.target: 默认值1在慢速或移动网络上优先保证可靠性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show other devices' cursors and selections while editing.
ast.target: 编辑时显示其他设备的光标和选区。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your server URL. This is usually filled in automatically by the setup flow.
ast.target: 您的服务器URL。通常由设置流程自动填充。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Devices syncing the same vault must use exactly the same vault ID. Change only if you know what you are doing.
ast.target: 同步同一保险库的设备必须使用完全相同的保险库ID。仅在您清楚操作后果时才进行更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Example: https://github.com/you/yaos-server. Provider is inferred from this URL.
ast.target: 可选。示例：https://github.com/you/yaos-server。提供商将根据此URL推断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for GitLab pipeline links and future provider-native update helpers.
ast.target: 用于GitLab流水线链接和未来的提供商原生更新助手。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how the plugin handles file changes from Git, scripts, or other editors.
ast.target: 选择插件如何处理来自Git、脚本或其他编辑器的文件更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pause suspicious YAML property updates before they spread. Disable only while troubleshooting valid frontmatter that is being blocked.
ast.target: 在可疑的YAML属性更新扩散前暂停它们。仅在排查被阻止的有效前置内容时禁用此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable verbose console logs for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用详细的控制台日志以进行故障排除。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max text file size in kilobytes
ast.target: 最大文本文件大小（千字节）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Paste the generated GitHub or GitLab repo URL

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Could not generate a setup code.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy the mobile setup URL.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 桌面端深度链接已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy the desktop deep link.
ast.target: 复制桌面端深度链接失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy the connection details.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure the server URL, sync token, and vault ID before pairing.
ast.target: 配对前请先配置服务器URL、同步令牌和保险库ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure the server URL, sync token, and vault ID before exporting connection details.
ast.target: 导出连接详情前请先配置服务器URL、同步令牌和保险库ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: YAOS: Could not resolve the active editor instance. Live collaborative editing is unavailable. Background sync may still continue, but live cursors and editor binding are degraded. Please check for a plugin update.
ast.target: YAOS：无法解析活动编辑器实例。实时协作编辑不可用。后台同步可能仍在继续，但实时光标和编辑器绑定功能已降级。请检查插件更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure the server host in settings to enable sync.
ast.target: 请在设置中配置服务器主机以启用同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Connecting over unencrypted HTTP. Your token will be sent in plaintext. Use HTTPS for production.
ast.target: 正在通过未加密的HTTP连接。您的令牌将以明文发送。生产环境请使用HTTPS。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: YAOS: This file won't sync yet — attachment sync needs a Cloudflare R2 bucket. Open YAOS settings for a 1-minute setup guide.
ast.target: YAOS：此文件暂无法同步——附件同步需要一个Cloudflare R2存储桶。打开YAOS设置查看1分钟设置指南。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 调试信息已复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy to clipboard. Check console.
ast.target: 复制到剪贴板失败。请检查控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Recent sync events printed to console.
ast.target: 最近的同步事件已打印到控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有未跟踪的文件可导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在清除缓存并重新同步...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Snapshots are unavailable until object storage is configured on the server.
ast.target: 在服务器上配置对象存储之前，快照功能不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Not connected to server — cannot create snapshot.
ast.target: 未连接到服务器——无法创建快照。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Not connected to server — cannot browse snapshots.
ast.target: 未连接到服务器——无法浏览快照。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Object storage is unavailable. Attachment transfers are paused and snapshots are unavailable.
ast.target: 对象存储不可用。附件传输已暂停，快照功能不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Legacy server detected. Sync continues, but update metadata and 1-click updater features need a newer server.
ast.target: 检测到旧版服务器。同步将继续，但更新元数据和一键更新器功能需要更新的服务器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Setup link is missing a host or token.
ast.target: 设置链接缺少主机或令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Setup link is missing the vault ID. This may create a separate sync room on this device.
ast.target: 设置链接缺少保险库ID。这可能会在此设备上创建一个单独的同步房间。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 配对已取消。保险库ID未更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 服务器已链接。正在开始同步...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings saved. Reload the plugin to reconnect with the new server.
ast.target: 设置已保存。请重新加载插件以使用新服务器重新连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This server is unclaimed. Open the server URL in a browser, then use the setup link.
ast.target: 此服务器未认领。请在浏览器中打开服务器URL，然后使用设置链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unauthorized. Check your token in settings.
ast.target: 未授权。请在设置中检查您的令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在导出同步诊断信息...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在导出迁移前诊断信息...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在导出迁移后诊断信息...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No snapshots found. Take a snapshot first.
ast.target: 未找到快照。请先创建一个快照。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重新连接到同步服务器

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force reconcile vault with sync state
ast.target: 强制协调保险库与同步状态

ast.name: name
ast.target: 复制调试信息到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 立即导入未跟踪的文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重置本地缓存（从服务器重新同步）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Nuclear reset (wipe sync state and reseed from disk)
ast.target: 核弹级重置（清除同步状态并从磁盘重新播种）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scan this setup code on your phone to open the setup page. If the plugin is not installed yet, the page will guide you through the beta install flow first.
ast.target: 在手机上扫描此设置码以打开设置页面。如果插件尚未安装，页面将首先引导您完成测试版安装流程。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 请将此信息保存在安全的地方

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save this somewhere safe, like a password manager. If you lose all your devices, you will need this exact vault ID and token to recover your notes from your server.
ast.target: 请将此信息保存在安全的地方，例如密码管理器。如果您丢失了所有设备，您将需要此确切的保险库ID和令牌才能从服务器恢复您的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin needs a free sync server to sync your data. It costs $0 and takes about 15 seconds.
ast.target: 此插件需要一个免费的同步服务器来同步您的数据。费用为0美元，大约需要15秒。

ast.name: text
ast.source: After deployment, open your server URL, claim the server, then use the setup link.
ast.target: 部署后，打开您的服务器URL，认领服务器，然后使用设置链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the actions below to pair more devices or back up your connection details.
ast.target: 使用以下操作来配对更多设备或备份您的连接详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Legacy server detected. Sync will continue, but update metadata and 1-click updater features need a newer server.
ast.target: 检测到旧版服务器。同步将继续，但更新元数据和一键更新功能需要更新的服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Images, PDFs, and other attachments are not syncing yet.
ast.target: 图片、PDF和其他附件尚未同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add a Cloudflare R2 bucket to enable attachment sync. It takes about a minute.
ast.target: 添加一个Cloudflare R2存储桶以启用附件同步。大约需要一分钟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Claim your server in the browser, then use the setup link. You can also enter the connection details manually here.
ast.target: 在浏览器中认领您的服务器，然后使用设置链接。您也可以在此处手动输入连接详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing the server URL, sync token, or vault ID requires reloading the plugin.
ast.target: 更改服务器URL、同步令牌或保险库ID需要重新加载插件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No differences found between the snapshot and current state.
ast.target: 快照与当前状态之间未发现差异。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select files to restore from the snapshot. Created-since-snapshot files are shown for reference but cannot be "restored" (they didn't exist yet).
ast.target: 选择要从快照中恢复的文件。创建于快照之后的文件仅供参考，无法“恢复”（它们当时尚不存在）。
